titles.title: His Banner Over Me Is Love

verse.name: v1
v2
verse.lines: He set straight paths before my feet His banner over me is love, (repeat 3 times) His banner over me is love.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: He broke the chains and He set me free His banner over me is love (repeat 3 times) His banner over me is love.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: I am my Beloved's and He is mine His banner over me is love, (repeat 3 times) His banner over me is love.
